positive: A complex, stylized cosmic bloom featuring geometrically structured elements mixed with organic flora. The main subject is a central mandala-like cosmic flower, combining nebulae swirls, crescent moons, and simplified crystalline plant structures. The composition must be symmetrical, highly detailed, and centered for optimal apparel printing. Style must be hyper-detailed linework illustration, combining Art Deco symmetry with bioluminescent fantasy. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, ethereal gold, and burnt orange against a clean, stark background. The lighting should be dramatic and atmospheric, highlighting the sharp edges and patterns. Ensure clean silhouettes and scalable vector qualities.
negative: blurry, smudge, low resolution, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, dirty, noisy, amateur, photographic, photorealistic
